ops.note: End-to-end smoke in a temp git repo: open --finding --path --label → append --attach → finding clear --why → root-cause → fix --commit → confirm; show renders header/premise/findings/interleaved timeline/root-cause/resolution; status counts, search + relevant status badges, history arc all correct; negatives: reopen w/o reason = usage exit 2, confirmed→confirmed = illegal-transition conflict.
